penalties.description: Cannot determine completion as this appears to be a promotional video for the LapAR Pro system, not an actual task performance.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: This video shows promotional content for the LapAR Pro laparoscopic training system including system components, interface screens, and demonstrations of the equipment setup. No actual Precision Cutting task performance is visible - there is no gauze material, no cutting of a marked circle, and no task timing. This is clearly marketing material rather than a scoreable FLS task attempt.
